name: Cranberry Meatballs
directions: In a large bowl, mix the ground beef, crumbs, parsley, eggs, soy sauce, pepper, garlic powder, ketchup, and onion.
Blend well and form into small balls.
Brown in oven at 400°F for 15 minutes; pour off the grease.
While the meatballs are baking, combine cranberry sauce, chili sauce, brown sugar, and lemon juice.
After you drain off the fat, cover the meatballs with the sauce.  Bake uncovered at 300°F  for 15 minutes.

similar.name: Crockpot Sweet and Sour Cranberry Meatballs

name: Meatballs
directions: Mix ground beef, onion, garlic powder, salt, pepper, catsup, cracker crumbs and eggs.
Shape into 36 meatballs.
Place in a 13 x 9-inch pan.
Mix the cranberry sauce, chili sauce and brown sugar.
Pour over meatballs.
Bake at 350 degrees for 50-60 minutes.

similar.name: Savory Meatballs or Grape Jelly Meatballs

name: Cranberry Meatballs
directions: In a large bowl combine all the meatball ingredients.  Divide the meat into 4 sections and make 15 meatballs from each section.
Place in a large, greased casserole dish.
Combine all the sauce ingredients and pour over the meatballs.
Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.

similar.name: Crockpot Sweet and Sour Cranberry Meatballs
Sweet and Sour Meatballs and Sauce

name: Cocktail Meatballs
directions: In a large bowl, mix together the ground beef, egg, water, bread crumbs, and.
minced onion.
Roll into small meatballs. Bake at 350F for 20 to 25 minutes,.
turning once. In a slow cooker or large saucepan over low heat, blend the.
cranberry sauce, chili sauce, brown sugar, and lemon juice.
Add meatballs,.
and simmer for 1 hour before serving.

similar.name: Savory Meatballs or Grape Jelly Meatballs
Sweet and Sour Meatballs and Sauce

name: Cranberry Glazed Meatballs
directions: Heat oven to 375°F
In large bowl, combine all meatball ingredients; blend well. Shape into 1-inch balls; place in ungreased 15x10x1-inch baking pan.
Bake at 375° for 25-30 minutes or until meatballs are browned and no longer pink in center.
Meanwhile, in large saucepan, combine sauce ingredients; blend well. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Reduce heat to low; simmer 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add meatballs to sauce; stir to coat. Cook over medium heat about 5 minutes or until thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally. Makes 60 meatballs.
Make-Ahead Tip: Prepare and bake the meatballs up to 24 hours before your party. Cover and refrigerate them. Just before serving, prepare the sauce and heat the meatballs in it.

similar.name: Crockpot Sweet and Sour Cranberry Meatballs

name: Cocktail Meatballs
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
In a large bowl, mix together the ground beef, egg, water, bread crumbs, and minced onion. Roll into small meatballs.
Bake in preheated oven for 20 to 25 minutes, turning once.
In a slow cooker or large saucepan over low heat, blend the cranberry sauce, chili sauce, brown sugar, and lemon juice. Add meatballs, and simmer for 1 hour before serving.

similar.name: Sweet and Sour Meatballs and Sauce

name: Easy Cocktail Meatballs
directions: Combine all ingredients except meatballs on high heat and mix well.  Taste and adjust seasonings to your liking.
Add meatballs and stir so that the sauce is evenly distributed and covers all the meatballs.
Turn down to low and cook 3 - 4 hours.

similar.name: Sweet and Sour Meatballs and Sauce

name: Cranberry Meatballs
directions: In a small saucepan or microwave slowly melt the cranberry sauce until it is very smooth. (Microwave normally takes about 2 min on %50 stirring every 45 seconds)
Mix in chile sauce, brown sugar and lemon juice and stir until well blended.
Mix with your meatballs and place in Crockpot on low for about 2hours.

similar.name: Crockpot Sweet and Sour Cranberry Meatballs

name: Crockpot Sweet and Sour Cranberry Meatballs
directions: Make meatballs: Mix ground beef, onions, bread crumbs, egg, and seasoned salt together to form walnut sized meatballs. Add a bit more bread crumbs if the meat doesn't hold together well, or if it is too dry add a bit of olive oil.
In deep saucepan, over medium-high heat, heat the 2 tablespoons of olive oil.
Saute meatballs, turning often, until cooked through.
In a crockpot, put the cranberry sauce, beef broth, brown sugar, onions, vinegar, ketchup, cayenne pepper and Worcestershire sauce. Mix together.
Add meatballs .
Cook on high about two hours, stirring often.
When ready to serve, season with salt and pepper to taste.

name: Spicy Apple Glazed Meatballs
directions: In large bowl, whisk together egg and milk. Tear bread slices into bite sized pieces and add to bowl. Stir to coat and let sit 10 minutes. Add ground chuck, garlic, pepper, salt, and cayenne. Make meatballs (I came out with 28).
Place on a cookie sheet sprayed with cooking spray. Cook at 325 F for about 10 minutes. Turn once. Cook an additional 10 minutes. Drain.
Combine every other ingredient except green onions. Add to a pan and cook until thickened stirring constantly. Pour over meatballs. Add chopped green onions.
The original recipe called for frying the meatballs, but I like baking them instead and draining off the grease. Use whichever method you prefer.

similar.name: Sweet and Sour Meatballs and Sauce
Savory Meatballs or Grape Jelly Meatballs

name: Savory Meatballs or Grape Jelly Meatballs
directions: 1.COMBINE first 8 ingredients, mixing well; shape into 36 one-inch meatballs.
2.COOK in oil over medium heat 10 to 15 minutes or until browned. Drain on paper towels.
3.COMBINE grape jelly and chili sauce in large skillet. Cook over medium heat, stirring until well combined, about 3 minutes.

4.PLACE cooked or thawed meatballs in a single layer in skillet coating each meatball evenly with sauce. Cover; simmer 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until sauce is bubbly and meatballs are cooked through.
5.TRANSFER glazed meatballs to a chafing dish or slow cooker. Serve with frilly toothpicks.

similar.name: Sweet and Sour Meatballs and Sauce

name: Sweet and Sour Meatballs and Sauce
directions: Make meatballs in usual fashion, being careful not to overwork or they will be tough.  Brown in frypan 'til no longer pink in the centre.

Make sauce, simmer ingredients together, having mixed flour in gently, making sure there are no lumps. Add meatballs to sauce and allow to simmer for an hour and a half or place all in slow cooker for 4 - 6 hours on low to med. Recipe also works well with farmer sausage chunks.
Enjoy.
